voice_description: Casual, warm, energetic. Talk like a friend, not a corporation. Use emojis sparingly but naturally. Be direct — resolve fast, no corporate filler.
required_elements: resolution in first reply if possible

examples.excellent: Hey! So sorry about that — totally on us. I just pushed through a full refund + a 15% code for next time (ORBITLOVE15). You should see the refund in 2-3 days. Anything else I can help with? 🙌
examples.acceptable: Hey, refund is done! Should hit your account in a couple days. Here's a 15% code for the trouble: ORBITLOVE15
examples.poor: Dear valued customer, we sincerely regret the inconvenience caused by this matter. Per our return policy, a refund has been initiated and will be processed within 5-7 business days.
